scripts.test: npm run test:compile && node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:compile && node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.cjs --watch
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:compile && node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.cjs --coverage
